nasb.text: And if the ear says, “Because I am not an eye, I am not a part of the body,” it is not for this reason any the less a part of the body.

esv.text: And if the ear should say, “Because I am not an eye, I do not belong to the body,” that would not make it any less a part of the body.

cnv.text: 假如耳朵說：“我不是眼睛，所以我不屬於身體。”它也不能因此就不屬於身體。

ccb.text: 如果耳朵说：“我不是眼睛，所以我不属于身体。”难道耳朵就因此不属于身体吗？

csbs.text: 如果耳朵说：“因为我不是眼睛，我就不属于身体”，难道它因此就不属于身体吗？
